summary: COMPARISON two side-by-side panels, each a pair of stacked Axes (time-pulse on top, frequency-echo on bottom). LEFT BLUE 'Short pulse' σ=0.3 shows a narrow time envelope (sharp range) and wide Gaussian spectrum (broad velocity). RIGHT RED 'Long pulse' σ=1.5 shows a wide time envelope (fuzzy range) and narrow spectrum (sharp velocity). Bottom MathTex: σ_t · σ_f ≥ 1/(4π) ⇒ the range-velocity tradeoff is unavoidable.
